---
title: "Projects"
toc: false
---

Technical projects, implementations, and research experiments.

Each project includes source code, documentation, and — where applicable — links to the relevant papers or references.

::: {.project-placeholder}
Projects will appear here as they are published. Check back soon, or visit the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/DiegoFilippoMarino/Eigenholm) for the latest work.
:::
